response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of fullstack experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js depth in recent roles, hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling work, and demonstrated testing craftsmanship (TDD, authored test frameworks). Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and MongoDB/MySQL experience align well. Gaps are the specific frameworks Nest.js and Vitest, limited evidence of recent deep React work, and a current career gap — all addressable in an interview.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js product work
Direct AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing framework authorship
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
React exposure appears limited relative to backend depth
Currently in a career gap since October 2025
